details.reasoning: Complete and correct implementation. All rubric requirements fully satisfied: (1) INIObject.zig created with proper create/parse/stringify functions accepting JSGlobalObject and returning JSValue; (2) Parse function in interchange/ini.zig handles sections ([section] and [a.b.c]), key=value pairs, and both ; and # comments with proper type coercion; (3) BunObject.zig properly wires INI via toJSLazyPropertyCallback with getINIObject getter; (4) BunObject+exports.h includes macro(INI); (5) BunObject.cpp hash table entry added with proper callback naming; (6) TypeScript definitions in bun.d.ts include complete INI namespace with parse and stringify signatures and comprehensive JSDoc; (7) Parser is self-contained with no npm INI imports; (8) Code follows Zig conventions with jsc.JSFunction.create, ZigString.static, @import("bun"), and proper imports/exports. Integration across api.zig and interchange.zig complete. Comprehensive test suite (308 lines) covers parse/stringify functionality, edge cases, type coercion, comments, sections, round-trip compatibility, and error handling.
